programs.title: The Neighborhood
programs.desc: When Calvin and Dave's college basketball teams go head-to-head, Dave surprises the Butlers with tickets to the game; a friend from Michigan visits and reveals surprising new details about Dave.

programs.title: The Neighborhood
programs.desc: When the Johnsons invite the Butlers to go camping, Dave is taken aback by Calvin's idea of roughing it; Gemma and Tina cross paths with Maynard, a general store proprietor who may not be as friendly as he seems.

programs.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programs.sub_title: The Two Faces of Squidward; Spongehenge
programs.desc: Squidward is rushed to the hospital when SpongeBob accidentally slams the door on his face; the music that comes from the wind blowing through SpongeBob's holes attracts jellyfish.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Moto Pups: Pups vs. the Ruff-Ruff Pack
programs.desc: Stunt motorcyclist Wild Cat joins the patrol to try to keep Ruff-Ruff Pack troublemakers from trashing the town.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Pups Stop a Gold Finding Machine; Pups Help Mayor Humdinger Out of a Jam
programs.desc: The PAW Patrol springs into action when a digging machine goes out-of-control and takes Uncle Otis on a wild ride; Digi and Tal try to help Mayor Humdinger but leave the Mayor covered in jam, so the Pups must rescue him from hungry animals.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Search and Rescue: Pups Save a Swept-Away Sweetheart; Search and Rescue: Mystery of the Missing Kitties
programs.desc: Ms. Marjorie is paddleboarding out to celebrate her anniversary with Hurricane Harrigan on Seal Island when she disappears!; Mayor Humdinger can't find his kitties, so he runs to the Safety and Rescue Pups for help!
